zh.lifeSummary: 當Jossine De Lannoy於1519年出生在比利時海瑙特莫倫白可時，她的父親Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy34歲，母親Françoise de Barbançon19歲。她於大約1542年與Jan de Halewyn結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1561年5月18日享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jossine De Lannoy于1519年出生在比利时海瑙特莫倫白可时，她的父亲Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy34岁，母亲Françoise de Barbançon19岁。她于大约1542年与Jan de Halewyn结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1561年5月18日享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lannoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brighid, Padraic.

variants.name: Lennon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Aileen, Brendan, Colm, Finian, John Patrick, Kieran, Ronan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leannáin ‘son of Leannán’, a personal name probably derived from leann ‘cloak, mantle’. Ó Lionnáin is an alternative form, Anglicized as Linnane .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Lonáin or Ó Luinín ‘descendant of Luinín’, or from the rare Galway name Mac Lonáin ‘son of Lonán’, all derived from a personal name based on a diminutive of lon ‘blackbird’.

en.lifeSummary: When Jossine De Lannoy was born in 1519, in Molenbaix, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy, was 34 and her mother, Françoise de Barbançon, was 19. She married Jan de Halewyn about 1542. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 18 May 1561, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jossine De Lannoy est née en 1519, à Molenbaix, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Françoise de Barbançon, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Jan de Halewyn environ 1542. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1561, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jossine De Lannoy 1519 in Molenbaix, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy 34 und ihre Mutter Françoise de Barbançon 19. Sie hat um 1542 Jan de Halewyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1561 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jossine De Lannoy è nata il nel 1519 nel Molenbaix, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Françoise de Barbançon, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Jan de Halewyn circa 1542. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 18 maggio 1561, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jossine De Lannoyが1519年にベルギーヘイナトモレンベイックスで生まれた時，父Chevalier Philippe de Lannoyは34歳，母Françoise de Barbançonは19歳であった。約1542年にJan de Halewynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1561年5月18日に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jossine De Lannoy(이)가 1519년 벨기에 하인오트 모렌베이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Françoise de Barbançon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1542년 Jan de Halewyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1561년 5월 18일 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jossine De Lannoy nasceu em 1519, em Molenbaix, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Françoise de Barbançon, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan de Halewyn aproximadamente 1542. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1561, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jossine De Lannoy родилась в 1519 г. в местности моленбеикс, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Françoise de Barbançon, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan de Halewyn около 1542 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 мая 1561 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jossine De Lannoy nació en 1519, en Molenbaix, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Chevalier Philippe de Lannoy, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Françoise de Barbançon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jan de Halewyn aproximadamente 1542. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1561, a la edad de 42 años.
